disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe crushing central chest pressure that came on at rest and has been constant for about 45 minutes
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the pain and where it is?
When did it start and what were you doing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a crushing, heavy pressure right in the middle of my chest, like an elephant is sitting on me. It came on out of nowhere about three quarters of an hour ago while I was just sitting watching TV, and it hasn't let up at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain radiates down the inner left arm (now numb) and up to the jaw
trigger_question_examples: Does the pain spread anywhere else?
Any pain or numbness in your arms, neck or jaw?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — it's going down the inside of my left arm and my arm has gone completely numb, and I can feel it up in my jaw too.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Drenching sweat, nausea and one episode of vomiting accompanying the pain
trigger_question_examples: Are you sweaty, sick or feeling like vomiting?
Any other symptoms with the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm pouring with sweat and I feel really sick — I've already thrown up once.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe breathlessness and profound exhaustion with the pain
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself overall?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't catch my breath and I feel completely drained, like all my energy has gone.

trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling emotionally right now?
What are you most worried about?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I honestly feel like I'm going to die — something is terribly wrong.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Nothing relieves the pain — not rest nor a change of position
trigger_question_examples: Does anything make it better or worse?
Does resting or changing position help at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing helps — I've tried sitting still and shifting around and it makes no difference at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No previous episodes and no known heart problems or regular medications
trigger_question_examples: Have you had anything like this before?
Do you have any heart conditions or take any regular medicines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I've never had anything like this and I've never had trouble with my heart — I don't take any regular tablets.
